creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

We have feedback, now. 

Please send such information to freebsd-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG instead 
of to the bugs@FreeBSD.ORG list.  Doing so ensures that the information 
becomes attached to the proper PR (so long as you use a subject heading 
such as "Re: kern/6865"). 

Anyways, this looks like an SMP problem, but I can't afford crashing 
right now to see how specific it is to the submitter.  Any volunteers?
